title: Delicious Syrian Napa Cabbage Soup
description: A fresh, chewy, indulgent Syrian-inspired soup featuring napa cabbage and namul-blanch seasoning, served in a copper mug for a cozy dining experience.
instructions: Heat the copper mug over medium heat and swirl in the olive oil.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Toss in the sliced napa cabbage and julienned carrot, sautéing until the vegetables begin to soften, about 4 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth and add the tamari, smoked paprika, and lemon juice, bringing the mixture to a gentle boil.
Lower the heat, cover the mug, and let the soup simmer for 12 minutes until the cabbage is tender yet still chewy.
Remove the mug from heat and, using a spoon, stir in a pinch of sea salt to taste.
Ladle the soup into individual mugs, ensuring an even distribution of vegetables.
Garnish with a sprinkle of chopped fresh parsley or cilantro for color (optional).
Serve hot, enjoying the comforting warmth of the Syrian-inspired Napa cabbage soup.
